text.title: Requirements Validation and Sign-Off Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying requirements-validation. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.fix: Validation precedes implementation; verification follows. Sequence is mandatory.
All 10 attributes required; skipping creates baselined defects.

antipattern.symptom: Text walkthrough for a UI requirement.
antipattern.fix: Match technique to requirement type; UI needs prototype review.
Chunk into ≤200; segment by functional area.
